news.title: Over-50s drive language travel growth as learning becomes a lifestyle choice
news.summary_en: Language travel has long been associated with younger learners. But a fast-growing demographic – the over-50s – is redefining who study abroad is for.
news.author: Kim Martin

news.title: Indian students urged to check UK voting eligibility ahead of tonight’s deadline
news.summary_en: The National Indian Students and Alumni Union UK (NISAU) has launched a campaign, My Vote Matters, encouraging Indian students residing in the UK to check their eligibility to vote in the upcoming local elections.
news.author: Charlotte Greenstein

news.title: Revealed: Kaplan Languages Group to be bought by Inspirit Capital
news.summary_en: Inspirit Capital – a UK-based investment company specialising in corporate carveouts – is acquiring language-learning giant Kaplan Languages Group (KLG) from Kaplan, The PIE can reveal.
news.author: Beth Kennedy

news.title: ECA partners with Birkbeck on India campus push
news.summary_en: Education Centre of Australia (ECA) has expanded its global campus network through a new partnership with Birkbeck, University of London, supporting the establishment of its Bengaluru campus as part of efforts to bring UK and Australian universities into India’s education landscape.
news.author: Abhishek Nair

news.title: UK international enrolments down 30% year on year
news.summary_en: BUILA survey points to sharp declines across South Asian markets as institutions tighten recruitment before new Home Office compliance measures take effect.
news.author: Abhishek Nair
